items.summary: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 5, CWS 6. Bobby Witt Jr. led the night, 1-3 | HR, 2 BB, K in the latest Royals game. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.9 mph.
items.title: Royals at White Sox Recap
